title: Divine Gold
description:
[FABRIC][1.21.1]
Adds a new craftable ore to minecraft, the DIvine Gold.
Use it to make new tools, and finally make EXCALIBUR, The Sword of Promised Victory.
This is my first project ever with minecraft, no need to take it too seriously
body:
Adds a new craftable ore to minecraft, the Divine Gold.
Use it to make new tools, and finally make EXCALIBUR, The Sword of Promised Victory.
...
Honestly, i just really wanted to see Excalibur on minecraft, so I tried making this, it is basically a mod for personal use, so no need to take it too seriously.
Also, the Excalibur mod is based on the PROTO-Arthur Excalibur from the FATE series.
This is my first project ever with minecraft
